scoring_adjustments: Removed modal auxiliaries from causal-edge counting to reduce false progression credit
Reduced progression_credit weight from cause and contrast edges when semantic frame loops are present
Reduced rhetorical_recurrence_credit dependence on repeated phrase count and added explicit refrain marker handling
Strengthened collapse_penalty with frame-loop risk contribution
Added bounded cadence-relief downgrade from collapse to warn-level semantic spin for cadence-driven refrain cases
